_info: Each snippet has versions.since (min Laravel version) and optional versions.deprecated + versions.alt (replacement prefix). Extension code reads composer.json and badges descriptions at runtime.

body: * Get the attributes that should be cast.

Laravel Model: Get Original.description: Get Original: Get original value before changes.

Laravel Model: Refresh.description: Refresh: Re-hydrate the existing model instance.

Laravel Model: Where Belongs To.description: Where Belongs To: Query the belongsTo relationship.

Laravel Model: Replicate.description: Replicate: Create a fresh copy of the model.

Laravel Model: Make Visible.description: Make Visible: Temporarily make hidden attributes visible.

Laravel Model: Make Hidden.description: Make Hidden: Temporarily make visible attributes hidden.
